key_points: All-time record revenue reached $124.3 billion, up 4% year-over-year, driven by strong Services and Mac growth.
Services revenue achieved an all-time record of $26.3 billion, growing 14% year-over-year across all segments.
Record net income of $36.3 billion and diluted EPS of $2.40 both grew 10% year-over-year.
Company gross margin expanded to 46.9%, with management providing strong gross margin guidance for the next quarter.
reasoning: Apple delivered robust earnings, achieving all-time records in overall revenue, net income, and EPS. Profitability was a key highlight, with gross margins expanding and EPS growth of 10% significantly outpacing the 4% revenue growth. Earnings quality is strong, supported by the record active install base and high-growth Services segment. While Products revenue growth was more modest at 2% and iPhone revenue was flat, the strength in Services and Mac, coupled with confident gross margin guidance, indicates a healthy financial position.
